hero.subtitle: Experience divine darshan, devotional music, Digital spiritual art, personalized blessings & ancient wisdom — all in one sacred app.

features.title: One App for Your Complete Spiritual Journey
features.subtitle: From live temple darshan to digital art — everything you need to deepen your connection with the divine.

darshan.title: Live Darshan
darshan.desc: 50+ temple live streams from across India — darshan anytime, anywhere

divyaChhavi.title: Divya Chhavi
divyaChhavi.desc: Digital divine portraits with your favorite deities & gurus

music.title: Devotional Music

wishmate.title: Wishmate

astro.title: Astro & Panchang

tunemate.title: Tunemate
tunemate.desc: Compose your own devotional bhajans digitally — your voice, your bhajan!

sangrah.title: Timeless Wisdom at Your Fingertips
sangrah.subtitle: Explore our curated collection of aartis, chalisas, mantras, festival guides, and Ayurvedic wisdom.

sangrahPage.title: Timeless Wisdom at Your Fingertips
sangrahPage.desc: Dive into our curated collection of aartis, chalisas, mantras, festival guides, Ayurvedic remedies, and deity knowledge — all available in 11 Indian languages.

aarti.title: Aarti Collection
aarti.desc: Complete collection of sacred aartis with full lyrics, audio, meaning, and significance.

chalisa.title: Chalisa Collection
chalisa.desc: Full text of all popular chalisas with audio, translation, and spiritual significance.

mantra.title: Mantra Collection
mantra.desc: Powerful mantras for peace, prosperity, protection and spiritual growth with pronunciation guide.

ayurveda.title: Ayurvedic & Home Remedies
ayurveda.desc: Ancient Ayurvedic wisdom for modern wellness — natural remedies, seasonal health tips, and lifestyle guides.

festivals.title: Festival Guide
festivals.desc: Complete guide to Hindu festivals — exact dates, rituals, significance, puja vidhi, and traditions.

deities.title: Deity Encyclopedia
deities.desc: Explore the stories, mantras, temples, and iconography of 30+ deities and spiritual gurus.

download.title: Begin Your Sacred Journey Today
download.subtitle: Join thousands of devotees experiencing the divine through Sanatan Sangam. Available in 11 Indian languages.

social.title: Stay Connected with Sanatan Sangam
social.subtitle: Follow us for daily spiritual content, updates, and bhajans.

footer.brand: Your complete spiritual companion — live darshan, devotional music, digital sacred art, blessings & more in 11 Indian languages.

darshanPage.heroDesc: Experience live darshan from {count}+ temples across India — Jyotirlingas, Char Dhams, Shakti Peethas, Gurudwaras & more.
darshanPage.ctaTitle: Watch Live Darshan in the App
darshanPage.ctaDesc: Download Sanatan Sangam for live streams, aarti notifications, full-screen viewing & more.

artPage.title: Artmate — Digital Sacred Art: Divya Chhavi & Teerth Yatra
artPage.description: Create stunning digital spiritual portraits with your favorite deities and gurus using Divya Chhavi, or visit sacred temples virtually with Teerth Yatra.
artPage.heroTitle: See Yourself in the Divine Light
artPage.heroDesc: Our digital Artmate creates breathtaking spiritual portraits and virtual pilgrimages. Choose from Divya Chhavi for sacred portraits or Teerth Yatra for virtual temple visits.
artPage.card1Desc: Generate stunning divine portraits of yourself with 30+ deities and gurus. Choose Shiva, Krishna, Hanuman, Durga, or your beloved Guru — and see yourself in their divine presence.
artPage.feature1_4: 🖼️ Order premium frames from Uphar Store
artPage.card2Desc: Visit India's most sacred destinations virtually. Generate beautiful photos of yourself at temples, ghats, and pilgrimage sites across the country.
artPage.feature2_2: 🌅 Time of day: Day, Sunset, Night
artPage.feature2_3: 📐 Multiple aspect ratios: Square, Portrait, Landscape
artPage.ctaBottomDesc: Download Sanatan Sangam and experience the magic of digital sacred art.

wishPage.title: Wishmate — Personalized Digital Blessings
wishPage.description: Send personalized digital blessings for birthdays, anniversaries, Diwali, Holi, Raksha Bandhan & every special occasion. Choose your deity and create divine blessing cards.
wishPage.heroTitle: Send Divine Blessings to Your Loved Ones
wishPage.heroDesc: Create personalized blessing cards for every special occasion. Choose your deity, add a personal touch, and share divine wishes that truly move the heart.
wishPage.videoTitle: Watch How Blessings Come to Life
wishPage.ctaBottomDesc: Download Sanatan Sangam and create beautiful, personalized blessing cards for your loved ones.

musicPage.title: Devotional Music — 200+ Bhajans, Aarti, Mantra & Chalisa
musicPage.description: Stream 200+ ad-free devotional songs: Aarti, Bhajan, Mantra, Chalisa, Kirtan & Instrumental. Filter by deity, mood, or genre in Hindi, English & regional languages.
musicPage.heroDesc: Immerse yourself in divine melodies. Stream ad-free bhajans, aarti, mantras, chalisas & more in Hindi, English and regional Indian languages.
musicPage.tunemateDesc: Compose personalized devotional bhajans digitally. Choose your deity, occasion, language, tempo, vocals & instruments.

upharPage.title: Uphar Store — Sacred Photo Frames
upharPage.description: Order premium divine photo frames for your Artmate creations. Classic Black & Walnut Brown frames with live preview, online payment & cash on delivery.
upharPage.heroDesc: Turn your Artmate creations into stunning wall art. Order premium photo frames in Classic Black or Walnut Brown — delivered to your doorstep.
upharPage.step1Desc: Generate divine portraits using Divya Chhavi or Teerth Yatra in the Art tab.
upharPage.step2Desc: Pick Classic Black or Walnut Brown frame with live preview of your artwork.
upharPage.step3Desc: Pay online or COD. We ship across India & internationally (USD supported).
upharPage.ctaBottomDesc: Download Sanatan Sangam, create your divine art, and order beautiful frames.

astroPage.title: Astro — Daily Horoscope, Panchang & Kundli
astroPage.description: Get daily horoscope for all 12 zodiac signs, today's Panchang with Tithi & Nakshatra, and generate your complete Kundli birth chart with planet positions.
astroPage.heroDesc: Get personalized daily horoscopes, today's Panchang with Tithi & Nakshatra details, and generate your complete Kundli birth chart.
astroPage.horoscopeDesc: Tap your zodiac sign for daily predictions on Love, Career & Health
astroPage.panchangDesc: Tithi, Nakshatra, Vaar, Yoga, Sunrise & Sunset — updated daily
astroPage.kundliDesc: Get your complete Kundli with planet positions, Manglik Dosh analysis, Sun Sign & Moon Sign.
